            🔍 Findings

            ✅ Portal Renders Beautifully (9/10)

            Full net4sats branding via both IP and domain (after DNS fix). Production-ready UI.

            ✅ DNS Fix: net4sats.lan Works

            Adding to /etc/hosts fixed dnsmasq resolution. Portal accessible via http://net4sats.lan:2050/

            ✅ Payment + Internet Work

            Lightning payment instant (~3s). Internet confirmed with example.com loading fully.

            ❌ Chrome DoH Blocks tollgate.lan

            Admin at tollgate.lan fails in Chrome. Workaround: use IP http://192.168.1.1/

            ⚠️ Invoice QR Not Visible

            Portal didn't transition to QR display after tapping Generate Invoice. Payment worked via API but UI didn't update.

            ⚠️ Phone Call Disrupted Test

            CaptivePortalLogin screenshot captured a phone call instead of the portal.
